# terrible_community_general_file_remove (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `path` (String) Path to the directory where files should be removed. This must be an existing directory.
- `pattern` (String) Pattern to match files for removal. Supports wildcards (`*`, `?`, `[seq]`, `[!seq]`) for glob-style matching. Use `use_regex=true` to interpret this as a regular expression instead.

### Optional

- `file_type` (String) Type of files to remove.
- `recursive` (Boolean) If `true`, search for files recursively in subdirectories. If `false`, only files in the specified directory are removed.
- `use_regex` (Boolean) If `true`, `pattern` is interpreted as a regular expression. If `false`, `pattern` is interpreted as a glob-style wildcard pattern.

### Read-Only

- `files_count` (Number) Number of files removed.
- `removed_files` (String) List of files that were removed.
